description: Letter from Yefet b. Menashshe to his brother Ḥalfon b. Menashshe (fl. 1100-1138 CE). In Judaeo-Arabic. Fragment (thin strip from the right side of recto). Mentions: a Maghribī; Abū Saʿd b. [...]; "a bit of Armenian bole (ḥajar armanī)"; [...] b. Ayyūb.
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
